sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11796" key="a)pe/krusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπέκ-ρῠσις</orth>, <sense id="n11796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπέρασις</ref></xr>, q.v.</sense> </entryFree>
